div.head: Article 513
div.p:
514
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
Lee 280 Leiden 349, 354 Leob 293 Léon 294, 305 Levi 295 Levon 4 Leyde 294, 295 Lipšic 295, 297 Lisboa 292 London 82, 114, 229, 279, 295, 423, 488 Londre 293 Lucille 407 Macler 300, 465 Made 118, 438 Madec 118 Madyes 118 Madys 118 Magistros 7, 141, 153, 156, 159, 160, 161, 162,
163, 164, 165, 351, 352
